java-output.title: Output
java-output.concept: System.out.println writes a line. In Java, Output is easiest to learn by tracing the value flow in the example: where a value is created, which expression reads or transforms it, and what finally reaches stdout. Before editing the exercise, predict the output line by line so the syntax is tied to behavior.
java-output.worked_example: The worked example shows Output in Java with the smallest code shape that produces an observable result. Read it once for syntax, then trace the value from creation to the final output.
